name: Miami Pallets
current_signal: Official transport pages describe forklift-equipped vehicles, moffett-equipped rigs, GPS tracking, insured deliveries, and tri-county to Central Florida coverage
why_not_in_master_yet: Contact page shows mixed identity signals including an Austin, TX footer, so the company needs direct phone verification before it can enter the master carrier list
next_step: Call the main line from the official contact page and confirm legal entity
source_2: and whether transport is for-hire beyond pallet sales
column18: Promising lead, but identity consistency is not clean enough yet

name: CED Mercedes Electric Supply
current_signal: Official fleet page shows a 30' flatbed with Donkey Lift and 5,000 lb all-terrain forklift
why_not_in_master_yet: Looks like a shipper private fleet rather than a public for-hire carrier
next_step: Call to ask whether they ever haul overflow or dedicated third-party freight
source_note: Excellent equipment signal but weak for-hire signal

name: Capitol Materials Coastal
current_signal: Official FAQ says fleet includes flatbeds, boom trucks, and portable forklifts for jobsite delivery
why_not_in_master_yet: Company reads as GMS-owned building-material distributor fleet, not a stand-alone carrier
next_step: Phone-verify whether they outsource capacity or ever haul for outside accounts
source_note: Useful Jacksonville signal for equipment usage, but not enough to count as carrier

name: Blue Sky Metals
current_signal: Official job-site delivery page says most trailers have mounts for piggyback forklifts and shows piggyback/truck-mounted forklift imagery
why_not_in_master_yet: This is a rebar fabricator and delivery fleet, not clearly a for-hire carrier
next_step: Call to ask whether they ever backhaul or support outside freight
source_note: Very strong piggyback signal but still shipper-led

name: Cornerstone Building Brands
current_signal: Official CDL posting requires loading and unloading with a Manitou or Moffett and operating a trailer-mounted forklift
why_not_in_master_yet: This is a manufacturer fleet job posting, not a public carrier service page
next_step: Use as proof that North Florida suppliers are running Moffett-capable fleets and mine similar manufacturers
source_note: Good discovery clue for the region

name: Wahoo Delivery Corp
current_signal: Classified lead claimed truck-mounted forklift / Princeton / Moffett delivery
why_not_in_master_yet: No clean official website or current stable company identity was found, so this stays out of the master list
next_step: Discard unless a current official site or direct phone verification ties the operation to an active for-hire entity
source_note: Good example of why classified-only leads should not enter the master list
